---
title: "AEGIS Audit Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  aegis_obj: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5)
x <- params$aegis_obj
stopifnot(inherits(x, "aegis"))
```

# Dataset Overview

- Spots: `r ncol(x$seu)`
- Genes: `r nrow(x$seu)`
- Methods: `r paste(names(x$deconv), collapse = ", ")`

# Method Overview

```{r method-overview}
method_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(x$deconv), function(m) {
  mat <- x$deconv[[m]]
  data.frame(method = m, n_spots = nrow(mat), n_celltypes = ncol(mat))
}))
knitr::kable(method_tbl)
```

# Basic Audit

```{r basic-audit-table}
if (is.null(x$audit$basic)) x <- audit_basic(x)
knitr::kable(x$audit$basic$summary_table)
```

```{r basic-audit-plot}
plot_audit(x, type = "dominance")
```

# Marker Audit

```{r marker-audit-table}
if (is.null(x$audit$marker)) x <- audit_marker(x)
knitr::kable(x$audit$marker$summary_table)
```

```{r marker-audit-plot}
plot_audit(x, type = "marker")
```

# Spatial Audit

```{r spatial-audit-table}
if (is.null(x$audit$spatial)) x <- audit_spatial(x)
knitr::kable(head(x$audit$spatial$method_summary, 12))
```

```{r spatial-audit-plot}
plot_audit(x, type = "smoothness")
```

# Method Comparison

```{r compare-table}
if (is.null(x$consensus$comparison)) x <- compare_methods(x)
knitr::kable(x$consensus$comparison$pairwise_summary)
```

```{r compare-plot}
plot_compare(x, type = "heatmap")
```

# Consensus

```{r consensus-table}
if (is.null(x$consensus$result)) x <- compute_consensus(x)
knitr::kable(head(x$consensus$result$celltype_stability, 12))
```

```{r consensus-plot}
plot_compare(x, type = "consensus_map")
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
